name: mcp-server-aws-code-documentation
description: Analyzes repository structure and generates comprehensive documentation for code projects

rating.reason: The toolset provides adequate documentation with clear workflow descriptions and detailed parameter schemas, but suffers from inconsistent quality. While complex parameters like ProjectAnalysis are well-documented with examples, the descriptions are verbose and include deprecation warnings that detract from clarity. Tool names are functional but generic, and some descriptions contain implementation details rather than focusing on usage context.
